source: scripts/fresh_7day_backtest.js cross-validated against debug/definitive_15m_cycle_cache_7d.json (May 2-9) and debug/7day_backtest_raw.json (May 13-20)

missionContext.candidate: 8-rule 15m portfolio: ALL signals validated >60% WR in BOTH independent 7-day windows (May 2-9 and May 13-20)
missionContext.reasonLoaded: Previous H19+H16 strategy had 36.9% WR in fresh 7-day data (statistically indistinguishable from noise). Full scan of 192 combinations across two independent windows found 16 robust signals. Top 8 selected by minimum cross-window WR. Kelly fractions at 75% Kelly for balance of profit vs bust risk.
missionContext.validationMethod: Binomial p-value test with Bonferroni correction (threshold 0.05/192=0.00026). Cross-window validation: both windows must show >60% WR. Adversarial stress test: -10% WR degradation, +5¢ slippage, 80% fill rate.

latestKnownStrictResults.entryPriceBands: priceMin=0.35 priceMax=0.72 per direction (captures historical spread)

missionContext.sizingVerdict: 75% Kelly chosen for BOOTSTRAP tier (<$100 balance). Provides median $352 in 7 days at 0.26% bust. Full Kelly available via KELLY_FRACTION env but increases bust to 1.62%. Half Kelly (50%) is safest at $157 median 0.01% bust.
missionContext.regimeStability: All 8 signals validated across two independent non-overlapping 7-day windows separated by a gap. Regime change risk: if actual WR degrades by >15% from historical, median drops near break-even. Daily re-audit recommended.
missionContext.addedTimesVerdict: 8 different time slots (H3:15, H6:15, H6:30, H7:15, H12:00, H13:15, H13:30, H19:30) — all non-overlapping 15-min cycles. No conflict with MAX_GLOBAL_TRADES_PER_CYCLE=1 since each fires in its own cycle.

strategies.name: ROBUST_15M_H19_M30_UP
strategies.notes: 19:30 UTC UP. Window1(May2-9): 85.7% WR (24/28). Window2(May13-20): 76.2% WR (32/42). Combined 80.0% WR. Robust across BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP individually (71-93%). Avg entry price ~0.491. Kelly=53%, using 75%=0.40 of bankroll.
